titles.title: Lord, I Want Much More of You – v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, I want much more of You To daily dwell in Your presence To decrease that You may increase And every day, dear Lord, Be much more like You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I give You my heart today I give You my spirit I surrender my will, Dear Lord, to You Everything I have, O Lord, All that I possess, Lord God, is Yours I want to decrease That You may increase

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, we thank You For Your grace So we can come Into Your presence To adore and exalt Your Name Desiring for Your Word To manifest once more

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord I give You my heart, I give You my soul, I live for You alone. Every breath that I take, Every moment I'm awake, Lord have Your way in me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: This is my desire: to honor You. Lord with all my heart I worship You. All I have within me, I give You praise. All that I adore is in You.
